author: WangKaiLin
name: PipeOwl-1.8-jp-parameter-golf
blurb: An experimental field-based language model that replaces pairwise attention with a linear-time interaction mechanism (PipeOwl). Focuses on embedding compression and alternative representation instead of SOTA performance.
notes: This submission explores a non-transformer architecture using field representation, Δfield interaction, and fallback channels. Not optimized for benchmark score; intended as a conceptual and structural experiment.
